about.title: About Biruh Tesfa
about.subtitle: Light of Hope - Crafting futures, one piece at a time.
about.p1: Established in Addis Ababa, BIRUH TESFA Furniture has grown from a local workshop into one of Ethiopia's premier luxury furniture and lighting creators. Our name translates to 'Bright Hope'—reflecting our mission to brighten your home and build your future.
about.p2: We combine traditional woodworking techniques with modern, minimalist design aesthetics. Every bed, dining table, and light fixture is crafted to provide a sense of luxury, functionality, and lasting durability.
about.craft_desc: Every log is hand-inspected, and every crystal in our chandeliers is hand-hung. We believe details make the difference between furniture and art.
